# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System
 * XML Configuration File Parser using SimpleXML
 */

class XmlConfigurationParser
{
    private ?SimpleXMLElement $xml = null;
    private array $settings = [];
    private array $errors = [];
    private int $maxFileSizeBytes = 5242880; // 5MB
    private array $allowedRootElements = ['configuration', 'config', 'settings', 'appSettings'];

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML configuration file
     *
     * @param string $xmlString The raw XML string content
     * @return bool True if parsing was successful
     */
    public function parse(string $xmlString): bool
    {
        $this->settings = [];
        $this->errors = [];

        if (!$this->validateInput($xmlString)) {
            return false;
        }

        $xmlString = $this->sanitizeXmlInput($xmlString);

        // Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
        $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        $previousLibxmlUseInternalErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        try {
            $this->xml = simplexml_load_string(
                $xmlString,
                'SimpleXMLElement',
                LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOENT | LIBXML_NOCDATA
            );

            if ($this->xml === false) {
                $this->collectLibxmlErrors();
                return false;
            }

            $rootName = $this->xml->getName();
            if (!in_array(strtolower($rootName), array_map('strtolower', $this->allowedRootElements))) {
                $this->errors[] = "Invalid root element '{$rootName}'. Allowed: " . implode(', ', $this->allowedRootElements);
                return false;
            }

            $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($this->xml);
            return true;

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->errors[] = "XML parsing exception: " . $e->getMessage();
            return false;
        } finally {
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlEntityLoader);
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousLibxmlUseInternalErrors);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Parse from an uploaded file ($_FILES)
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded file
     * @return bool True if parsing was successful
     */
    public function parseUploadedFile(array $uploadedFile): bool
    {
        if (!isset($uploadedFile['tmp_name'], $uploadedFile['error'], $uploadedFile['size'], $uploadedFile['name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = "Invalid file upload data.";
            return false;
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->errors[] = "File upload error code: " . $uploadedFile['error'];
            return false;
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['size'] > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = "File exceeds maximum allowed size of " . ($this->maxFileSizeBytes / 1048576) . "MB.";
            return false;
        }

        $extension = strtolower(pathinfo($uploadedFile['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if ($extension !== 'xml') {
            $this->errors[] = "Invalid file extension '{$extension}'. Only .xml files are allowed.";
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = "Security check failed: file was not uploaded via HTTP POST.";
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = "Failed to read uploaded file.";
            return false;
        }

        return $this->parse($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Get all extracted settings as a flat associative array
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getSettings(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by its dot-notation key
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed
     */
    public function getSetting(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        return $this->settings[$key] ?? $default;
    }

    /**
     * Get settings under a specific prefix
     *
     * @param string $prefix The prefix to filter by (e.g., "database")
     * @return array
     */
    public function getSettingsByPrefix(string $prefix): array
    {
        $prefix = rtrim($prefix, '.') . '.';
        $filtered = [];

        foreach ($this->settings as $key => $value) {
            if (strpos($key, $prefix) === 0) {
                $shortKey = substr($key, strlen($prefix));
                $filtered[$shortKey] = $value;
            }
        }

        return $filtered;
    }

    /**
     * Get nested settings as a multi-dimensional array
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getNestedSettings(): array
    {
        $nested = [];

        foreach ($this->settings as $key => $value) {
            $keys = explode('.', $key);
            $current = &$nested;

            foreach ($keys as $i => $part) {
                if ($i === count($keys) - 1) {
                    $current[$part] = $value;
                } else {
                    if (!isset($current[$part]) || !is_array($current[$part])) {
                        $current[$part] = [];
                    }
                    $current = &$current[$part];
                }
            }

            unset($current);
        }

        return $nested;
    }

    /**
     * Get any parsing errors
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if parsing had errors
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasErrors(): bool
    {
        return !empty($this->errors);
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed file size
     *
     * @param int $bytes Maximum size in bytes
     * @return self
     */
    public function setMaxFileSize(int $bytes): self
    {
        $this->maxFileSizeBytes = $bytes;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set allowed root element names
     *
     * @param array $elements
     * @return self
     */
    public function setAllowedRootElements(array $elements): self
    {
        $this->allowedRootElements = $elements;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Validate and export settings to a JSON string
     *
     * @return string|false
     */
    public function toJson()
    {
        if (empty($this->settings)) {
            return false;
        }

        return json_encode($this->getNestedSettings(), JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    }

    /**
     * Validate the raw XML input string
     *
     * @param string $xmlString
     * @return bool
     */
    private function validateInput(string $xmlString): bool
    {
        if (empty(trim($xmlString))) {
            $this->errors[] = "XML input is empty.";
            return false;
        }

        if (strlen($xmlString) > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = "XML content exceeds maximum allowed size.";
            return false;
        }

        // Check for potential XXE attack patterns
        $dangerousPatterns = [
            '/<!ENTITY/i',
            '/<!DOCTYPE[^>]*\[/i',
            '/SYSTEM\s+["\']/',
            '/PUBLIC\s+["\']/',
        ];

        foreach ($dangerousPatterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $xmlString)) {
                $this->errors[] = "Potentially dangerous XML content detected (external entities or DTD declarations are not allowed).";
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize the XML input string
     *
     * @param string $xmlString
     * @return string
     */
    private function sanitizeXmlInput(string $xmlString): string
    {
        // Remove any DOCTYPE declarations entirely
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/<!DOCTYPE[^>]*>/i', '', $xmlString);

        // Remove processing instructions except for the XML declaration
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/<\?(?!xml\s)[^?]*\?>/i', '', $xmlString);

        return trim($xmlString);
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from SimpleXMLElement into a flat array
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element
     * @param string $prefix
     * @param int $depth
     * @return array
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, string $prefix = '', int $depth = 0): array
    {
        $settings = [];
        $maxDepth = 20;

        if ($depth > $maxDepth) {
            $this->errors[] = "XML nesting exceeds maximum depth of {$maxDepth}.";
            return $settings;
        }

        // Handle attributes of the current element
        foreach ($element->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
            $attrName = $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName);
            $key = $prefix ? "{$prefix}.@{$attrName}" : "@{$attrName}";
            $settings[$key] = $this->castValue((string)$attrValue);
        }

        // Track child element names for handling repeated elements
        $childCounts = [];
        foreach ($element->children() as $child) {
            $name = $child->getName();
            if (!isset($childCounts[$name])) {
                $childCounts[$name] = 0;
            }
            $childCounts[$name]++;
        }

        $childIndices = [];

        foreach ($element->children() as $child) {
            $name = $this->sanitizeKey($child->getName());
            $childKey = $prefix ? "{$prefix}.{$name}" : $name;

            // Handle repeated elements by appending an index
            if ($childCounts[$child->getName()] > 1) {
                if (!isset($childIndices[$name])) {
                    $childIndices[$name] = 0;
                }
                $childKey .= '.' . $childIndices[$name];
                $childIndices[$name]++;
            }

            $childChildren = $child->children();
            $childAttributes = $child->attributes();
            $hasChildren = $childChildren->count() > 0;
            $hasAttributes = count($childAttributes) > 0;

            if ($hasChildren || $hasAttributes) {
                // Recursively process child elements
                $childSettings = $this->extractSettings($child, $childKey, $depth + 1);
                $settings = array_merge($settings, $childSettings);

                // If the element also has text content alongside children/attributes
                $textContent = trim((string)$child);
                if ($textContent !== '') {
                    $settings["{$childKey}.#value"] = $this->castValue($textContent);
                }
            } else {
                // Leaf node — extract the text value
                $value = trim((string)$child);
                $settings[$childKey] = $this->castValue($value);
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Cast a string value to its appropriate PHP type
     *
     * @param string $value
     * @return mixed
     */
    private function castValue(string $value)
    {
        // Boolean values
        $lower = strtolower($value);
        if ($lower === 'true') {
            return true;
        }
        if ($lower === 'false') {
            return false;
        }
        if ($lower === 'null' || $value === '') {
            return null;
        }

        // Integer values
        if (preg_match('/^-?\d+$/', $value) && $value === (string)(int)$value) {
            return (int)$value;
        }

        // Float values
        if (is_numeric($value) && strpos($value, '.') !== false) {
            return (float)$value;
        }

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration key
     *
     * @param string $key
     * @return string
     */
    private function sanitizeKey(string $key): string
    {
        // Allow alphanumeric characters, underscores, hyphens
        return preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '_', $key);
    }

    /**
     * Collect libxml errors
     */
    private function collectLibxmlErrors(): void
    {
        $errors = libxml_get_errors();
        foreach ($errors as $error) {
            $level = match ($error->level) {
                LIBXML_ERR_WARNING => 'Warning',
                LIBXML_ERR_ERROR   => 'Error',
                LIBXML_ERR_FATAL   => 'Fatal',
                default            => 'Unknown',
            };
            $this->errors[] = "XML {$level} (Line {$error->line}, Column {$error->column}): " . trim($error->message);
        }
        libxml_clear_errors();
    }

    /**
     * Validate the parsed configuration against a required keys schema
     *
     * @param array $requiredKeys Array of dot-notation keys that must be present
     * @return bool
     */
    public function validateRequiredKeys(array $requiredKeys): bool
    {
        $missing = [];

        foreach ($requiredKeys as $key) {
            if (!array_key_exists($key, $this->settings)) {
                $missing[] = $key;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($missing)) {
            $this->errors[] = "Missing required configuration keys: " . implode(', ', $missing);
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Merge another configuration into the current settings (for defaults/overrides)
     *
     * @param array $defaults Default settings to apply where no value is set
     * @return self
     */
    public function applyDefaults(array $defaults): self
    {
        foreach ($defaults as $key => $value) {
            if (!array_key_exists($key, $this->settings)) {
                $this->settings[$key] = $value;
            }
        }

        return $this;
    }
}


// =============================================================================
// Usage Examples / Demo
// =============================================================================

// Example XML configuration content
$sampleXml = <<<'XML'
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration version="2.1" environment="production">
    <application>
        <name>Enterprise CRM</name>
        <version>4.2.0</version>
        <debug>false</debug>
        <maintenance_mode>false</maintenance_mode>
    </application>

    <database>
        <host>db-master.internal.example.com</host>
        <port>5432</port>
        <name>enterprise_crm</name>
        <username>app_user</username>
        <password>s3cur3P@ssw0rd!</password>
        <pool_size>25</pool_size>
        <ssl_enabled>true</ssl_enabled>
        <options>
            <timeout>30</timeout>
            <charset>utf8mb4</charset>
            <retry_attempts>3</retry_attempts>
        </options>
    </database>

    <cache>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <host>cache.internal.example.com</host>
        <port>6379</port>
        <ttl>3600</ttl>
        <prefix>crm_v4_</prefix>
    </cache>

    <logging>
        <level>warning</level>
        <file>/var/log/enterprise-crm/app.log</file>
        <max_file_size>104857600</max_file_size>
        <rotation>daily</rotation>
        <channel>
            <name>slack</name>
            <webhook>https://hooks.slack.com/services/T00/B00/xxxx</webhook>
        </channel>
        <channel>
            <name>email</name>
            <recipient>ops@example.com</recipient>
        </channel>
    </logging>

    <security>
        <session_lifetime>7200</session_lifetime>
        <csrf_enabled>true</csrf_enabled>
        <rate_limit requests_per_minute="60" burst="10" />
        <allowed_origins>
            <origin>https://app.example.com</origin>
            <origin>https://admin.example.com</origin>
        </allowed_origins>
    </security>

    <feature_flags>
        <new_dashboard>true</new_dashboard>
        <beta_reports>false</beta_reports>
        <api_v3>true</api_v3>
    </feature_flags>
</configuration>
XML;

// Initialize parser
$parser = new XmlConfigurationParser();
$parser->setMaxFileSize(10 * 1024 * 1024); // 10MB

// Parse the XML
if ($parser->parse($sampleXml)) {
    echo "=== Configuration Parsed Successfully ===\n\n";

    // Get all flat settings
    echo "--- All Settings (Flat) ---\n";
    foreach ($parser->getSettings() as $key => $value) {
        $displayValue = is_bool($value) ? ($value ? 'true' : 'false') : (is_null($value) ? 'null' : $value);
        echo "  {$key} = {$displayValue}\n";
    }

    echo "\n--- Database Settings ---\n";
    $dbSettings = $parser->getSettingsByPrefix('database');
    foreach ($dbSettings as $key => $value) {
        $displayValue = is_bool($value) ? ($value ? 'true' : 'false') : $value;
        echo "  {$key} = {$displayValue}\n";
    }

    echo "\n--- Specific Setting Access ---\n";
    echo "  App Name: " . $parser->getSetting('application.name') . "\n";
    echo "  DB Host: " . $parser->getSetting('database.host') . "\n";
    echo "  DB Port: " . $parser->getSetting('database.port') . "\n";
    echo "  Cache TTL: " . $parser->getSetting('cache.ttl') . "\n";
    echo "  Debug Mode: " . ($parser->getSetting('application.debug') ? 'true' : 'false') . "\n";
    echo "  Missing Key (with default): " . $parser->getSetting('smtp.host', 'localhost') . "\n";

    // Validate required configuration
    echo "\n--- Validation ---\n";
    $requiredKeys = [
        'database.host',
        'database.port',
        'database.name',
        'database.username',
        'application.name',
    ];

    if ($parser->validateRequiredKeys($requiredKeys)) {
        echo "  All required keys present.\n";
    } else {
        echo "  Validation failed:\n";
        foreach ($parser->getErrors() as $error) {
            echo "    - {$error}\n";
        }
    }

    // Apply defaults
    $parser->applyDefaults([
        'application.timezone' => 'UTC',
        'cache.ttl' => 1800, // Won't override existing value
        'smtp.host' => 'smtp.example.com',
        'smtp.port' => 587,
    ]);

    echo "\n--- After Applying Defaults ---\n";
    echo "  Timezone (default applied): " . $parser->getSetting('application.timezone') . "\n";
    echo "  Cache TTL (kept existing): " . $parser->getSetting('cache.ttl') . "\n";
    echo "  SMTP Host (default applied): " . $parser->getSetting('smtp.host') . "\n";

    // Nested settings
    echo "\n--- Nested Settings (JSON) ---\n";
    echo $parser->toJson() . "\n";

} else {
    echo "=== Configuration Parsing Failed ===\n";
    foreach ($parser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  ERROR: {$error}\n";
    }
}

// Example: Testing security - XXE attack prevention
echo "\n\n=== Security Test: XXE Prevention ===\n";
$maliciousXml = <<<'XML'
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
]>
<configuration>
    <database>
        <host>&xxe;</host>
    </database>
</configuration>
XML;

$securityParser = new XmlConfigurationParser();
if (!$securityParser->parse($maliciousXml)) {
    echo "  XXE attack blocked successfully!\n";
    foreach ($securityParser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  Reason: {$error}\n";
    }
}

// Example: Handling file upload in a controller context
echo "\n\n=== File Upload Example (simulated) ===\n";
echo "  In a real application, use \$parser->parseUploadedFile(\$_FILES['config_file']);\n";

/*
// Example controller usage:
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
    $parser = new XmlConfigurationParser();
    $parser->setMaxFileSize(2 * 1024 * 1024); // 2MB limit

    if ($parser->parseUploadedFile($_FILES['config_file'])) {
        // Validate required settings
        $required = ['database.host', 'database.name', 'application.name'];
        if ($parser->validateRequiredKeys($required)) {
            // Store or apply configuration
            $configJson = $parser->toJson();
            file_put_contents('/etc/app/config.json', $configJson);
            echo "Configuration saved successfully.";
        } else {
            http_response_code(422);
            echo json_encode(['errors' => $parser->getErrors()]);
        }
    } else {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode(['errors' => $parser->getErrors()]);
    }
}
*/
